basic_details.job_title: DLSA Panna Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Panna (DLSA Panna) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Contract Driver (Vehicle Driver) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 10-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, Valid Driving License, Experience in driving all types of vehicles
qualification.details: Minimum 10th pass. Indian citizen. Valid driving license. Experience in driving all types of vehicles. Preference will be given to candidates with mechanical knowledge.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Panna Contract Driver (Vehicle Driver) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:mphc.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Panna Contract Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DLSA Panna Contract Driver (Vehicle Driver) position is 10-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Contract Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Contract Driver (Vehicle Driver) post in the District Legal Services Authority Panna.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a 10th pass, along with a valid driving license and experience in driving all types of vehicles.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Contract Driver position?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Contract Driver position is 18 years. The maximum age limit is not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Contract Driver post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 12000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection criteria for the Contract Driver role?
faq.answer: The selection process will include an Interview and a Practical Driving Test.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the DLSA Panna Contract Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
